_comment: The single CLIENT tool BrailleBuddy uses. Recreate this in the ElevenLabs dashboard (Agent → Tools → Add tool → type: Client). The name MUST be exactly render_braille — matched case-sensitively to the function in apps/web/components/Conversation.tsx. Pass the LETTER itself; the web app (apps/web/lib/braille.ts) looks up the dot pattern.
name: render_braille
description: Raise the pins on the single Braille cell to show ONE character, then drop them after the given time. Call once per letter you want the learner to feel. Pass the letter itself (not a dot code) — the device looks up the pattern.

parameters.description: The single character to show, e.g. "R". If more than one character is sent, only the first is used.
How long the character stays raised before the pins drop, in seconds. Use 3 for teaching, 2 for test words.
